questions.answer:
1. class declaration -> public class School
2. main method -> public static void main(String[] args)
3. opening method bracket -> { after the main method
4. print statement -> System.out.print("Sishya");
5. semicolon -> ; after the print statement

1. class name -> StudentInfo

3. main method -> public static void main(String[] args)
4. statement -> System.out.println("Age: 13");
